visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) A young woman in a black mesh top stands inside a bright Costco warehouse. She holds a transparent-topped cardboard box containing six large blueberry pastries. She smiles and points at the pastries while speaking enthusiastically. In the background, refrigerated grocery shelves and several other shoppers in winter attire move through the aisles under bright industrial lighting. (2) The scene cuts to a close-up of the pastry box, specifically focusing on the label which identifies them as 'Blueberry Blossom Pastries'. Variety-style fire graphics and text overlays appear around the box as she highlights the product details. (3) The location shifts to a clean, well-lit indoor home environment. Two women sit at a table; the first woman from the previous scene is joined by another woman wearing a white turtleneck and a black Kangol beret. They are holding halves of the pastry, showing the dark purple blueberry filling and the flaky crust topped with almond slices. They gesture with thumbs up and use animated facial expressions to indicate enjoyment. (4) Intermittent close-up insert shots show the pastry being pulled apart, revealing the internal jam-like texture and the layers of the dough. Yellow and blue variety captions frequently pop up around their heads to emphasize their points.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Logo]: COSTCO WHOLESALE. (2) [Variety]: 你為什麼笑成這樣. (3) [Subtitle]: 這是什麼. (4) [Variety]: 超級黑馬 藍莓果醬奶酥. (5) [Subtitle]: 所有好吃的東西都加在一起了. (6) [Subtitle]: 天呐 這是免費升級嗎. (7) [Subtitle]: 因為我覺得聽起來比上次更好吃. (8) [Subtitle]: 藍莓真的很好吃耶. (9) [Subtitle]: 339元 6個然後他呢. (10) [Subtitle]: 只剩倒數3盒. (11) [Subtitle]: 留言自己來買. (12) [Slogan]: 藍莓果醬奶油酥 339 6入. (13) [Subtitle]: 所以一個是56塊. (14) [Variety]: 10分. (15) [Subtitle]: 我們1到10分給他 10分. (16) [Subtitle]: 它是奶油酥裡面我吃下來甜度最低最清爽. (17) [Subtitle]: 給的很誠意之外裡面還有新鮮的藍莓果粒. (18) [Subtitle]: 吃到藍莓的果肉. (19) [Subtitle]: 奶油酥配上下面酸甜的藍莓醬 絕配. (20) [Subtitle]: 必買料多誠意又美味.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 2 main female creators, approximately 6 other shoppers visible in the background aisles.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: One woman has long dark hair and wears a black mesh top. The second woman has shoulder-length dark hair and wears a white sweater with a black Kangol beret.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The initial setting is a Costco warehouse with large freezers, metal shelves, and industrial overhead lighting. The second setting is a modern indoor living or dining space with neutral-colored walls and a wooden table.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy female narration begins immediately over a bright, rhythmic electronic pop BGM. The voice is enthusiastic with a high pitch. (2) A sharp 'ding' sound effect coincides with the appearance of text on screen. (3) Background audio contains a very low-level hum characteristic of a large commercial space. (4) Transitioning to the second phase, a subtle 'whoosh' SFX leads into dual female voices interacting. (5) The dialogue is fast-paced, featuring collaborative exclamations and laughter. (6) The BGM maintains a consistent 4/4 upbeat tempo throughout the entire duration, mixed clearly below the primary speech signals.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Linear: Discovery -> Demonstration -> Detailed Evaluation -> Recommendation
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video aims to promote and review a specific Costco bakery product, 'Blueberry Blossom Pastry'. It uses a two-stage narrative structure—first showing the scarcity of the product in-store to create urgency, followed by a detailed tasting and high rating to validate the recommendation.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: Prominent display of brand logos, specific pricing information, and an enthusiastic 10/10 recommendation rating.

high_inference.freeDescribe: High-intensity social media editing with dense text overlays and fast-paced audio design makes this a typical 'recommendation' vlog.
